{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":1514},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7245815394522645286","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"第一次看到这样的一妻多夫，太有意思了，勾人心怀，写作人，写的非常好看又棒棒杠杠滴，没看多久就看完了，请作者快快的加油更新，更重要的五星好评给作者鼓励加油更新快点，看的意味深长太上瘾了，真真真的好看看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1687047997,"group_id":"7175606164535643151","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyCZLc6VSfeSER4ZpcqHQlcFsHh+fZH6Fll3EpUOzsC7","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"3905086370103132","user_name":"禄洲府的虎星"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3905086370103132","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1694928067,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7175606164535643151","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+空间+多男主+团宠+金手指+修炼了+复仇】
被男友和闺蜜背叛，求个平安签。
怎么就穿越到了末世了呢？
这世界因为天灾人祸男女比例严重失调
男多女少，12:1，女子规定必须娶夫？
丁晓萌穿越后才知道，原来她是重生了
这一世她要带夫君起飞，成就最强异能
修炼最强武技，复仇破阴谋。
组建自己的战队，建立属于自己的基地

"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7282322127582249740","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的是完美的大结局！真的超级好看，题材比较新颖，剧情也不拖拉，拥有四个老公是什么体验！看这本小说就知道了！有空间！有异能！疼爱的父母！丧尸王弟弟！小狐狸萌宠！空间之灵！最后还有双胞胎孩子！人生圆满！女主和男主们都很有自己的思想，细节处理的也很好，剧情超级好，女主不是柔弱型的，刚开始穿来还有点弱，等到被绑架后，见识了末世弱肉强食的道理，开始努力提升自己的能力，在男多女少的末世，可以和男主们并肩作战，很厉害。反正入坑不亏!哈哈哈哈[送心][送心][送心][送心]！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1695548767,"group_id":"7175606164535643151","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"夜猫子，喜欢美味的食物，喜欢好看的小说","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0P/rk5U25/zmaSJCjW9ozw=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9aac4b3ba95142ee912a0e3de232dc29~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788396&x-signature=I3JRuqsims8WDn0aOcEO8cLLVy0%3D","user_id":"153570396614152","user_name":"相濡以沫度余年"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"153570396614152","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1698888827,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"vip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a6117024b55cf7a088043cdb8fa5d48","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9d81e6d86e7f5048ab14f7f77e72ac0f","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"vip","title_id":"vip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"vip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7175606164535643151","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+空间+多 被男友和闺蜜背叛，求个平安签。
怎么就穿越到了末世了呢？
这世界因为天灾人祸男女比例严重失调
男多女少，12:1，女子规定必须娶夫？
丁晓萌穿越后才知道，原来她是重生了
这一世她要带夫君起飞，成就最强异能
修炼最强武技，复仇破阴谋。
组建自己的战队，建立属于自己的基地

}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7329908928568378174","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，第一次看末世背景的多夫文，感觉作者还挺听从读者的小意见；女主虽然偶尔有隐瞒前世的事情的想法，但最后还是及时有嘴说出来了，这是我很喜欢的一点，有事情及时说，及时讨论，及时应对；
全文女主和男主都在努力提升自己，且并不是老套路文女强男更强的设定，是女强男强的设定

digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7275513340045148984","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"喜欢丧尸末世类型的我强烈推荐这本，这是我看到的末日生存里少有的如此好看的小说，就是目前还在更新中，会继续追随作者大大的，我个人是很喜欢生化危机的人，可以反复看很多遍的那种，有的小说会把末世重生之人刻画的很无敌，我还是喜欢这总遇到绑架困难危险后才逐渐成长起来的，夫郎们也各有特色，就是和女主感情的进展太快了些，我觉得应该多给他们制造点感情上的小困难，那就更好了，喜欢超级好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1693963246,"group_id":"7175606164535643151","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"时光轻浅处，一步一安然。ƪ(˘⌣˘)ʃ优雅","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3idtYlOX02rz8CGMyI+k759hW08Se4I6507gvikTJ3P","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c65f8bf6353e4833b79d32d1e1d557ad~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794648&x-signature=hXz%2FGcbiyhyIU1D3qJ2qG4lAAAc%3D","user_id":"4007041446723079","user_name":"雾梦星月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4007041446723079","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7175606164535643151","book_info":{"abstract":"【末世+空间+多男主+团宠+金手指+修炼了+复仇】
